songs.title: Mr. Brightside
feed: “Mr. Brightside” by The Killers reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 1 spot to #1.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 147 sales units.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 325 streams units.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 578,074 total units.
